name: Rib Eye Steak with Stilton Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the cheese and butter until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, boil the wine with the peppercorns until reduced by about 1 tablespoon.
3. Add the cream and continue boiling until the liquid is reduced by half.
4. Reduce the heat to moderately low and whisk in the cheese mixture gradually into the cream mixture.
5. Stir in the parsley. Keep the sauce warm.
6. Preheat a grill pan. Pat steaks dry and season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill steaks for 4 to 5 minutes on each side for medium rare.
8. Let the steak stand on a cutting board for 10 minutes, then slice thin.
9. Serve slices with Stilton sauce and watercress.
Yield: 4 servings
